hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == */Migrations/* && "$filepath" == *.cs ]]; then echo '⚠️  Migrations are immutable! Create a NEW migration instead of editing an existing one.' >&2; exit 2; fi

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == *.cs || "$filepath" == *.csproj ]]; then (nohup uvx --from git+https://github.com/oraios/serena serena project index-file "$filepath" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 &) ; fi
